government.title: Government Benchmarks
government.not-found: Exact match not found. Showing {marketDataYear} government data only

gov-user-selection.title: Refine Government Match
gov-user-selection.content: We found live job data for {category}, but couldn't automatically match a government benchmark. Please search for the most relevant government category below:

salary-negotiator.title: Master Salary Negotiations
salary-negotiator.strapline: Knowing your worth is just the beginning
salary-negotiator.body-html: We've partnered with {name} to help you secure the compensation you deserve. Learn the exact scripts used by top US executives to maximize their offers.
salary-negotiator.name: The Salary Negotiator

purple-cv.title: Resume Writing Services
purple-cv.strapline: A standard template won't land the interview
purple-cv.body-html: Position yourself for your next big career move with a professionally written resume. Experts design documents specifically to beat ATS algorithms and stand out to US recruiters.
purple-cv.name: PurpleCV

cv-library.title: Get Discovered by Recruiters
cv-library.strapline: Find a job that pays what you're worth
cv-library.body-html: Upload your resume to leading US job boards and let top employers come to you—it's fast, easy, and free.
cv-library.name: CV-Library

custom.title: Email Template
custom.strapline: A template script to help you start the conversation.
custom.body-html: Whether you're underpaid or looking to justify a raise, use this script to confidently communicate your value and set up a discussion with your manager.

no-data.title: No exact match found
no-data.could-not-find: We couldn't find enough data for

option-1.title: Try a broader search
option-1.description: Check for typos or try a broader job title.

option-2.title: Find By Category
option-2.description: Select a government category to find relevant salary data.

verdict.fairly-paid: Less than 2.5% variance from market average
